properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: What can I give, what can I bring That would be pleasing to my King I'll give my heart, not just a part I'm lifting up my everything Well it's all I have to offer And it's all I have to give

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Two hands, one heart One life to offer You Two hands, one heart That's what I give to You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Use me today, I know You can Lord, I surrender to Your plan You made this heart, You made these hands Take me and use me as I am Well it's all I have to offer And it's all I have to give

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Little becomes a lot when it's in Your hands Take me and make me more like You Well, it may not seem like much But with the Master's touch I know that I'll be more like You
